project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.App: Dev (http).executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.App: Dev (https).executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.App: Staging.executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.App: http.executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.App: https.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "ts.external.directory.path": "C:\\Program Files\\JetBrains\\JetBrains Rider 2025.2.0.1\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "mysql" ] } }
